claim.title: Claims and Rights Arising from Defective Performance
claim.text1: Customers are entitled to exercise their rights arising from defective performance through the Reli.one platform in accordance with applicable legal regulations.
claim.text2: The purchase contract is concluded directly between the customer and the respective seller.
claim.text3: The seller with whom the purchase contract has been concluded is responsible for product defects and for the proper handling of claims.
claim.text4: Detailed information regarding the scope of customer rights, the procedure for submitting a claim and the applicable time limits is provided in the Claims Policy.
claim.afterDesc: For questions or additional information, please contact our support team

withdawal.title: Withdrawal from the Contract and Return of Goods
withdawal.text1: Customers have the right to withdraw from a purchase contract concluded remotely through the Reli.one platform within 14 days from receiving the goods, without giving any reason.
withdawal.text2: The purchase contract is concluded directly between the customer and the respective seller.
withdawal.text3: The seller with whom the purchase contract has been concluded is responsible for receiving the returned goods and processing the refund.
withdawal.text4: Detailed information regarding withdrawal conditions, applicable time limits and the return procedure can be found in the terms and conditions.
withdawal.afterDesc: days from receiving your order to withdraw from the contract without giving any reason.

contact.title: Contact Information for Complaints and Returns
contact.text1: To submit a complaint or exercise the right to withdraw from a purchase contract, please complete the relevant form available on this page and send the completed form to the e-mail address below.
contact.afterDesc: If you have any questions or require additional information, you may also contact us by e-mail or by phone.
